statements.sql: select count(*) as aggregate from `cms` where `seo_url` = 'privacy-policy' and `id` <> '4'

update `cms` set `shortDescription` = '

At VoteYour, we stand for freedom of expression, without fear, filters, or footprints. This Privacy Policy outlines how we handle your information with care, transparency, and respect. Whether you’re here to vote, create polls, or simply scroll through what matters, your privacy stays protected.

1. What We Collect (and Why)

We collect only what we need to make your experience seamless, anonymous, and secure.

  • Basic Sign-Up Details

When you register, we only ask for your email address and mobile number. No full names, no profile photos, no personal stories, just a secure way for you to access your account.

  • Poll & Voting Data

When you create or participate in polls, we store the interactions anonymously. This helps us prevent misuse and ensure results are genuine. Your responses are never connected to your name or email.

  • Technical Data

To keep things running smoothly, we collect basic info such as:

  1. Your browser and device type
  2. Language preferences
  3. Approximate location (city level, never precise)
  4. IP address (temporarily, for spam protection)

This information is only used to improve your experience and monitor system performance.

2. What We Never Do

Transparency is non-negotiable. So here’s what we never do:

  • Sell your data
  • Show your identity linked to your activity.
  • Track your details
  • Send you promotional emails without consent.

You’re in control, always.

3. Cookies & Tracking

Like most websites, we use cookies. These small files help us:

  • Keep you signed in
  • Remember your settings
  • Load pages faster

But don’t worry, we don’t use cookies for advertising or third-party behavioral tracking. No creepy stuff here.

4. Your Rights & Controls

You have the right to manage your data your way.

Delete your account anytime: We’ll erase all related data from our servers permanently.

Access your data: Email us, and we’ll provide a summary of what we have, usually just your email and poll activity.

Opt-out of cookies: You can clear or block cookies via your browser settings.

5. Third-Party Services

We may use tools like Google Analytics or basic performance tracking tools to understand how users interact with our platform. These services may collect limited technical data but never your voting choices or identity.

We review every tool carefully to ensure it aligns with our strict privacy principles.

6. Keeping Your Data Secure

We prioritize security in every part of the platform:

  • Data encryption in transit and at rest
  • Secure server hosting
  • Regular audits and updates to prevent vulnerabilities

Limited access to sensitive data by verified personnel only

7. For Users Under 16

VoteYour is not designed for users under 16 years of age. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided personal data to us, please contact us immediately so we can delete it.

8. Updates to This Policy

We may occasionally update this Privacy Policy to reflect new features or legal requirements. If significant changes are made, we’ll notify users via email or a message on the site.

Still, Have Questions?

We're always happy to talk about privacy. If you have questions, feedback, or requests related to your data, contact or whatsapp us at: +90 555554 5554

', `cms`.`updated_at` = '2025-06-12 12:59:52' where `id` = 4
